title: bsw.sensors_config/1
description: config/sensors.json — the single source of truth for which zone each sensor feeds (FR-02/FR-03). The fusion engine builds the reverse zone->sensors index from this file at load. STRICT: additionalProperties:false (except $comment) on the top level and each sensor entry, so a misspelled key fails loud at load instead of silently defaulting (NFR-07).

stale_after_ms.description: a sensor with no fresh reading newer than this is treated as stale -> its zone goes UNKNOWN (NFR-04). Set >= 3x the slowest sample period (~600 ms for 5 Hz ultrasonic under group-fire) to avoid jitter-induced UNKNOWN flicker; see 05 §5.3.

fire_group.description: ultrasonic cross-talk grouping; sensors in the same group must not share an acoustic field (ADR-0007)
